title: Sick Leave Policy and Reporting Absences
text:
Q: What is the sick leave policy and how do I report an absence?
A: Our sick leave policy allows employees to take time off when they are ill or unable to work due to health issues. Employees are entitled to a certain number of paid sick days per year, as outlined in the employee handbook. To report an absence, please notify your direct supervisor as soon as possible, preferably before the start of your shift. You can do this via email or phone call. If your absence extends beyond three consecutive days, a doctor's note may be required. Remember to keep your supervisor updated on your status and expected return date.
